nodes.label: Settings Prompts Exports and Audit Endpoints
nodes.norm_label: settings prompts exports and audit endpoints

nodes.label: Single Feature Artifact Set
nodes.rationale: M1 through M8 share authentication, isolation, task, and data invariants, so one spec-plan-tasks set reduces duplicated cross-stage constraints and drift.

nodes.label: Deterministic Prompt Rendering
nodes.rationale: A non-executable single-pass placeholder grammar prevents object traversal and template execution while producing stable serialized inputs and hashes.

nodes.label: Frozen Prompt Test Inputs
nodes.rationale: Freezing prompt text, schema, and non-secret model configuration while checking live revision prevents queued work from mixing a new key with an old address.

nodes.label: Reliable PostgreSQL Task Delivery
nodes.rationale: Once PostgreSQL commits a pending task, the request is accepted even if Redis is down, avoiding lost intent and duplicate retries caused by reporting a committed request as failed.

nodes.label: Safe DOCX Boundary
nodes.rationale: Strict archive, OOXML, size, relationship, and cleanup checks treat uploaded documents as hostile input and prevent temporary files from becoming retained source artifacts.

nodes.label: packages contracts Shared Contract Boundary
nodes.rationale: Only stable request, response, event, task, error, and enum schemas cross process boundaries through packages/contracts.

nodes.label: packages backend Domain and Application Boundary
nodes.rationale: Domain, application, repository, and integration logic stay in packages/backend so Web cannot bypass the API boundary.
nodes.norm_label: packages backend domain and application boundary

nodes.label: Group Activity Add Step Prompt Task
nodes.norm_label: group activity add step prompt task

nodes.label: OpenAI Compatible AI Adapter
nodes.rationale: A supplier-neutral adapter classifies provider errors and validates structured output without exposing a generic chat gateway to business callers.

nodes.label: AI Key Envelope Encryption
nodes.rationale: AES-256-GCM with random nonces, bound AAD, key identifiers, and verified rotation protects both confidentiality and integrity across kindergarten and profile boundaries.

nodes.label: Model URL SSRF Protection
nodes.rationale: Model base URLs require public HTTPS by default, no redirects, and pre/post-connect DNS validation to block loopback, metadata, link-local, multicast, and unauthorized private targets.

nodes.label: Workday Local Online Degradation
nodes.rationale: Local calendar data is primary, online lookup is supplementary, and unavailable sources yield unknown/unavailable soft warnings rather than blocking lesson work.

nodes.label: Lesson Plan Snapshot Policy
nodes.rationale: Snapshots represent recoverable content changes, so manual save, archive, restore, and adopted AI create them while autosave, generation, retry, failure, and rejection do not.

nodes.label: Fixed Teacher Plan Word Template
nodes.rationale: Exports copy and validate the locked template so table structure, styles, line breaks, and the narrow red-text rule remain stable.

nodes.label: Column Level Preview Validity
nodes.rationale: A preview becomes stale only when its target section or actual inputs change, allowing independently generated columns to be adopted in any order.

nodes.label: One Click Four Column Fan Out
nodes.norm_label: one click four column fan out

nodes.label: Group Activity Two Phase Generation
nodes.rationale: Teachers may adopt a valid split before generating an added age-appropriate step, so add-step failure never rolls back the accepted split.

nodes.label: Minimal Prompt Variable Allowlist
nodes.rationale: Each task receives only variables necessary for that task, reducing privacy exposure and contract coupling.

nodes.label: WebAuthn Registration Authentication and Step Up Ceremonies
nodes.norm_label: webauthn registration authentication and step up ceremonies

nodes.label: Discoverable Credential Login
nodes.rationale: Username-free discoverable credentials avoid account enumeration before authentication and require user verification.

nodes.label: Bootstrap Initialization
nodes.rationale: The local CLI creates only a pending first administrator and a short-lived one-time registration secret; browser registration and two out-of-band approvals are still required.

nodes.label: Offline Recovery and Human Verification
nodes.rationale: A recovery code alone cannot establish a session; successful recovery also requires human verification, registers a new credential, and revokes old credentials, sessions, invitations, and codes.

nodes.label: Refresh Family Rotation and Replay Revocation
nodes.norm_label: refresh family rotation and replay revocation

nodes.label: Real Time Server Session Authorization
nodes.rationale: The access token sid is checked against current account, role, class, and Refresh-family state on every request so revocation takes effect immediately.

nodes.label: Expand Enroll Contract Password Migration
nodes.rationale: Expand adds passkey structures and disables password routes, enroll provides a narrow local registration window, and contract removes obsolete password columns only after zero-read and enrollment gates; downgrade cannot restore deleted secrets.

nodes.label: No upstream network access at runtime or during automated tests
nodes.norm_label: no upstream network access at runtime or during automated tests
